scope: Add Deployment-side controls for creating segment-scoped sketch lines without entering Battle Command
Render Deployment sketch-line overlay on the tactical frontage preview
Carry the Deployment-created sketch line into StandingOrderPlanSet.frontlineGeometry.sketchLines
Verify plan-set preview and clear behavior
Desktop QA only; mobile/cellphone is outside the current target
flow: Reset campaign and opened Theater -> Army Camp -> Deployment.
Verified the selected frontline handle editor exposed 現線を形状化 / 北寄せ形状 / 南寄せ形状 / 形状解除.
Clicked 現線を形状化 for the selected Forest Left Line.
Verified Deployment showed 形状3点, rendered one .deployment-sketch-overlay polyline, and showed 計画セット保存時に戦線形状 1線を含める。
Verified the plan-set row included 形状1線.
Opened 内容確認 and verified 保存戦線形状 森林左翼線 3点.
Verified the editor returned to 形状未保存 / 計画セット用の形状線なし, removed the overlay polyline, and removed the plan-save shape note.
notes: This is a button-driven Deployment sketch editor using the existing segment-scoped sketchLines model. It is not yet drag/freehand drawing on the map.
The plan set saved before clearing retains its saved shape preview, as expected.
Mobile QA was skipped because the current target excludes cellphone/mobile.
